prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Deep beneath the shimmering waves of the ocean, there lived a shy little octopus named Ollie. With his eight squiggly arms and a coat that changed colors like a magic rainbow, Ollie spent most days tucked away in his cozy coral cave, watching the other sea creatures play. He dreamed of joining in their games—swimming with the speedy fish or exploring sunken treasures—but his shyness made him hide whenever anyone came near. One bright morning, Ollie decided it was time to wiggle out of his cave and find a friend.
